name: @vinaystwt/vajra-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for Vajra program-owned policy vaults on Solana.

scripts.build: NODE_DISABLE_COMPILE_CACHE=1 node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --declaration --declarationMap --sourceMap --outDir dist --rootDir . --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck --types node $(find src examples -name '*.ts' -print) && mkdir -p dist/src/idl && cp src/idl/vajra.json dist/src/idl/vajra.json
